name: date
pattern: (\bdemain\b|\blundi\ prochain\b|\b15/06/2024\b|\bdans\ 2\ jours\b|\bla\ semaine\ prochaine\b|\btomorrow\b|\bnext\ Monday\b|\b06/15/2024\b|\bin\ 2\ days\b|\bnext\ week\b)

name: time
pattern: (\b14h30\b|\b9h\b|\bce\ soir\b|\bdemain\ matin\b|\bdans\ l'après\-midi\b|\b2:30\ PM\b|\b9\ AM\b|\btonight\b|\btomorrow\ morning\b|\bin\ the\ afternoon\b)
